zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich von Vianden於1221年出生在盧森堡維安德時，他的父親Heinrich I. von Vianden31歲，母親Marguerite de Courtenay27歲。他於1219年與Cäcilie von Schönecken在德國賀林根艾福特艾福特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1247年11月10日在他的家鄉享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich von Vianden于1221年出生在卢森堡維安德时，他的父亲Heinrich I. von Vianden31岁，母亲Marguerite de Courtenay27岁。他于1219年与Cäcilie von Schönecken在德国賀林根艾福特艾福特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1247年11月10日在他的家乡享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich von Vianden was born in 1221, in Vianden, Luxembourg, his father, Heinrich I. von Vianden, was 31 and his mother, Marguerite de Courtenay, was 27. He married Cäcilie von Schönecken in 1219, in Erfurt, Erfurt, Thuringia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 November 1247, in his hometown, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich von Vianden est né en 1221, à Vianden, Luxembourg, son père, Heinrich I. von Vianden, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Courtenay, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Cäcilie von Schönecken en 1219, à Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1247, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich von Vianden 1221 in Vianden, Luxemburg geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich I. von Vianden 31 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Courtenay 27. Er hat 1219 in Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Deutschland Cäcilie von Schönecken geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. November 1247 im Alter von 26 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Vianden è nato il nel 1221 nel Vianden, Lussemburgo, il suo padre, Heinrich I. von Vianden, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Courtenay, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Cäcilie von Schönecken nel 1219, nel Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 novembre 1247, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Viandenが1221年にルクセンブルクヴィアンデンで生まれた時，父Heinrich I. von Viandenは31歳，母Marguerite de Courtenayは27歳であった。1219年にドイツスuリンジェンエルファートエルファートでCäcilie von Schöneckenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1247年11月10日に故郷で26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Vianden(이)가 1221년 룩셈부르크 비누든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich I. von Vianden(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Courtenay(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1219년 독일 스u링 르퍼트 르퍼트에서 Cäcilie von Schönecken(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1247년 11월 10일 그의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Vianden nasceu em 1221, em Vianden, Luxemburgo, seu pai, Heinrich I. von Vianden, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Courtenay, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Cäcilie von Schönecken em 1219, em Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1247, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich von Vianden родился в 1221 г. в местности вянден, Люксембург, его отцу по имени Heinrich I. von Vianden было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Courtenay, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Cäcilie von Schönecken в 1219 г. в местности эрфурт, эрфурт, тuринген, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 ноября 1247 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich von Vianden nació en 1221, en Vianden, Luxemburgo, su papá, Heinrich I. von Vianden, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Courtenay, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Cäcilie von Schönecken en 1219, en Erfurt, Erfurt, Thüringen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1247, en su pueblo, a la edad de 26 años.
